allow: Bash('/c/Program Files/Tailscale/tailscale.exe' ssh titus@antecresi "hostname && pwd && ls ~/")

Bash('/c/Program Files/Tailscale/tailscale.exe' ssh titus@antecresi "curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/morningtrading/regime-trader/main/regime-trader/scripts/setup_antecresi.sh | REPO_DIR=/home/titus/regime-trader bash")
Bash('/c/Program Files/Tailscale/tailscale.exe' ssh titus@antecresi "ls ~/regime-trader/ && echo --- && ls ~/regime-trader/regime-trader/menu/ 2>&1")

Bash('/c/Program Files/Tailscale/tailscale.exe' ssh titus@antecresi "curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/morningtrading/regime-trader/main/regime-trader/scripts/setup_antecresi.sh | REPO_DIR=/home/titus/regime-trader bash && tail -2 ~/.bashrc")

Bash('/c/Program Files/Tailscale/tailscale.exe' ssh titus@antecresi "sed -i \\"s|cd /home/titus/regime-trader && bash menu|cd /home/titus/regime-trader/regime-trader && bash menu|\\" ~/.bashrc && tail -1 ~/.bashrc")

Bash('/c/Program Files/Tailscale/tailscale.exe' ssh titus@antecresi "grep -v 'alias transfert' ~/.bashrc > ~/.bashrc.new && mv ~/.bashrc.new ~/.bashrc && echo \\"alias transfert='cd /home/titus/regime-trader/regime-trader && bash menu/tailscale_transfer.sh'\\" >> ~/.bashrc && tail -1 ~/.bashrc")
Bash('/c/Program Files/Tailscale/tailscale.exe' ssh titus@antecresi "bash -ic 'type transfert' && ls /home/titus/regime-trader/regime-trader/menu/tailscale_transfer.sh")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Service sshd 2>&1 | Format-List Name,Status,StartType; Get-WindowsCapability -Online -Name OpenSSH.Server* | Select-Object Name,State; Get-NetFirewallRule -Name sshd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Enabled,Direction,Action")
